mapper.insert: insert into aiw_order_event (biz_id, order_biz_id, event_type, from_status, to_status, event_source, operator_biz_id, event_payload, occurred_at, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{orderBizId}, #{eventType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{eventSource}, #{operatorBizId}, #{eventPayload}, #{occurredAt}, #{createdAt})
